ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian P. Stubbs for Linda D. Stucky, Executor.

The court inquired about who Ann Prochnow's successor-in-interest is. Mr. Stubbs stated that Julie Prochnow is the successor-in-interest according to the will. He further explained that she is expected to be appointed in Florida, but the process was delayed due to difficulties locating the original will. The court inquired whether Julie Prochnow is also the beneficiary of Ann Prochnow's will, but Mr. Stubbs had not reviewed the document.

The court took the matter under submission with the intent to approve the distribution of cash to beneficiaries but hold back on the distribution to Ann Prochnow under successor-in-interest until the appointment is finalized. A status hearing was set for May 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, regarding filing proof of appointment of personal representative or 13100 affidavit.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Continued To Oct-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Stubbs appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Stubbs requested a 60-day continuance stating that he is at the brink of being able to file a petition for distribution and that the assets were sold. Status on close of estate is continued to October 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Stubbs is to file his petition by October 8, 2024. If the estate is not ready to be closed, Mr. Stubbs is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is set for hearing for the purpose of admitting the will with no appearance required. The Court notes that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated August 27, 2013 is admitted to probate. Linda D. Stucky is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. No bond is required as the same is waived by the terms of the Will. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on August 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
